title: Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings 19 Matching Service Providers HOME FORWARD SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Housing Choice Voucher (Section 8) program helps low-income residents afford rental homes and apartments at normal market rates. Project-based Section 8 assistance is available at many locations throughout Multnomah County. These are apartments where the subsidy stays with the unit (it can not be taken by the resident to another location). Listings of apartment vacancies are updated approximately every 4-6 weeks on the website. Also accepts calls to report misuse of the program. 135 SW Ash Street Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: -Low-income households -Age 18 or older at the time of application or an emancipated minor under State Law -Individuals who have a terminal illness and have been diagnosed by a medical provider with a life expectancy of 12 months or less may apply for Section 8 under priority status Hours: -Section 8 Housing Voucher program services: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm, in person -Section 8 office phone: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm, appointments can be scheduled Email (503) 802-8333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOMES FOR GOOD SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rental assistance to low-income families in the private rental market. A family member must complete a housing application and be placed on a waitlist. When the family reaches the top of the waitlist, income and assets are verified and the family may be considered eligible. The eligible family then locates a unit and a willing owner and enters into a lease agreement; the owner contracts with Homes for Good. Homes for Good pays the owner a portion of the family's rent based on their income. New families are added to the program as vacancies occur. Also fields complaints about Section 8 housing. 100 W 13th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Low-income families, pregnant women, older adults, and adults with disabilities. Eligibility is based on income, criminal history, and citizenship status at the time a household reaches the top of the waitlist. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 682-3755 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF DOUGLAS COUNTY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides vouchers to assist low-income households with rental costs. Once an eligible household is issued a voucher for rental assistance, the agency pays a portion of the household's rent directly to the landlords. Also issues both Family Choice Vouchers and HUD VASH Vouchers for veteran families. Additionally, fields general complaints about the Section 8 program. 1000 W Stanton Street Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Must meet income and asset guidelines Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm, Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 673-6548 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF JACKSON COUNTY HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance about information and acquisition of Section 8 vouchers and fields complaints about the program. Projected wait times for the program are 4-5 years. 2251 Table Rock Road Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines, pass a criminal background check, and have at least one family member who is a citizen or permanent resident of the US. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm. First Thursday of the month 10am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (541) 779-5785 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about affordable housing. Administers Section 8/Housing Choice Vouchers and public housing, in addition to fielding complaints about those programs. 1039 NW Nye Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Varies by program. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 265-5326 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF MALHEUR AND HARNEY COUNTIES HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers the following housing programs: -Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher Program: As of April 2018, Section 8 is accepting pre-applications for the wait list and has a 12-month wait time -Family Self-Sufficiency Program: Helps Section 8 recipients obtain education and job skills in order to become financially self-sufficient -Housing Choice Voucher Homeownership Program: Helps Section 8 recipients receive assistance toward a monthly mortgage payment -Low-Rent Public Housing Program: Provides federally subsidized rental housing -Farm Labor Housing: Offers housing for active and retired agricultural workers Also fields complaints about Section 8 and public housing programs. 959 Fortner Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: -Low-income households; applicants from outside Malheur and Harney Counties must reside in Malheur or Harney County for one year before requesting to move to another county. -Farm labor housing is available to domestic agricultural workers including those working on fish and oyster farms and on-farm processing; can be retired and/or disabled from agricultural work; must be a U.S. citizen or permanent resident. Available to laborers that handle any raw materials. Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 889-9661 101 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) rental assistance, including a Homeownership Voucher Program. Also offers a Family Self-Sufficiency program, Housing Rehab program, and manages several area affordable housing complexes for families, farmworkers, older adults, and people with special needs. 135 NE Dunn Place Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Varies; some programs may have residency or income requirements. Call for information. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 883-4300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JOSEPHINE HOUSING AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT COUNCIL HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rental assistance to low-income families through HUD's Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) program. This federally funded program provides rent subsidies that enable income-qualified participants to lease privately owned rental housing. Fields complaints about Section 8 HCV program. Also owns the 48-unit Harbeck Village apartments and the 56- unit Cathedral Square, affordable housing projects. Does not offer any emergency housing assistance. 1205 NE 7th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines. A monthly gross income chart can be viewed on agency website under "Applicants" Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 479-5529 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers two types of Section 8 housing assistance programs: Housing Choice Vouchers and Moderate Rehabilitation. Housing Choice Vouchers: Eligible families find their own rental units in the existing housing market. Moderate Rehabilitation: LBHA provides a rent subsidy guarantee to units that have been approved and rehabilitated in accordance with Housing and Urban Development (HUD) regulations. 1250 SE Queen Avenue Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 926-4497 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARION COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Marion County Housing Authority (MCHA), under contract with the US Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD), administers the Section 8 Voucher Program and several other rental assistance programs. MCHA also owns and manages several affordable apartment complexes for seniors, families, and farm laborers. Serves the rural areas of Marion County, which are outside the Urban Growth Boundary of the City of Salem. No assistance is available for Salem/Keizer residents. 2645 Portland Road NE Suite 200 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Eligibility varies by program. HUD-established income limits apply. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm, closed federal holidays Email (503) 798-4170 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-COLUMBIA AND COLUMBIA GORGE HOUSING AUTHORITIES HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER SECTION 8 Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable, tenant-based housing assistance for individuals who face barriers due to income, disability, or age. Assistance follows the tenant as long as they remain eligible. 500 E 2nd Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Low-income individuals and families Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4pm and by appointment Email (541) 296-5462 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTH BEND CITY COOS-CURRY HOUSING AUTHORITIES HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residents of the community with information about and access to affordable housing. Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher Program is tenant based assistance, meaning assistance follows the tenant as long as they remain eligible for the program. The Housing Authority is not the landlord but assists with rent payments to the landlords. Public Housing units are owned and managed by the Housing Authority. This program provides unit-based assistance, meaning if a family moves out of the unit, the assistance remains with the unit. One small pet is allowed with prior approval before moving into a unit. 1700 Monroe Street North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-4:30pm Email (541) 756-4111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHEAST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low-income and subsidized apartments. Available programs: Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers, Veterans Supportive Housing Vouchers, Section 8 Housing Voucher Homeownership, Mental Health Referred Housing, Family Self-Sufficiency, HUD Multi-Family Housing, Tax Credit Housing, and Rural Development Housing. 2608 May Lane La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (541) 963-5360 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers federal housing programs. Maintains a list of affordable housing and a bulletin board of local properties, including subsidized properties that are independently managed. Fields complaints about public housing and Section 8 housing. 147 S Main Avenue Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm; by appointment only Email (503) 861-0119 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST REAL ESTATE CAPITAL CORPORATION AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides housing for families, older adults, and adults with disabilities. Specializes in the property management and rehabilitation of HUD/Section 8, Rural Development, and Tax Credit Housing. 210 W Mallard Drive Suite A Boise, ID 83706 Eligibility: Varies by property Hours: No standard hours (208) 375-9407 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALEM HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about Section 8 housing in addition to fielding complaints about the program. 360 Church Street SE Salem, OR 973013707 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines, pass a criminal background check, and have at least one family member who is a citizen or lawful permanent resident of the US Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm. Closed all major holidays. Email (503) 588-6368 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UMATILLA COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers the federal and public housing programs including the Section 8 Housing Voucher program and manages several low-income apartment complexes. Listings of low-income properties, rural areas, and properties for agricultural workers. 155 SW Tenth Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: -Low-income households -Section 8: Income limits are 30% of median household income for the county (chart on website under public housing) -Programs prioritize families with children, older adults, and people with disabilities Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-12pm and 1pm-4pm, Wednesday 1pm-4pm Email (541) 567-3241 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals and information about income-based housing through local Public Housing Authorities and other providers, Federal Housing Administration (FHA) loans, manufactured housing; and referrals to HUD-approved housing counseling agencies for foreclosure, purchase, reverse mortgage, and budgeting assistance. A list of HUD-funded housing is available online. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 972042825 Eligibility: Income restrictions vary by program. Acceptance of rental application is at apartment manager's discretion. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm, closed federal holidays Message line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 222-2600 0 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WEST VALLEY HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about Section 8 housing and takes complaints about the program. 204 SW Walnut Avenue Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Income must be at or below 50% of Area Median Income Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (503) 623-8387 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOME FORWARD SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM HOMES FOR GOOD SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM HOUSING AUTHORITY OF DOUGLAS COUNTY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHERS HOUSING AUTHORITY OF JACKSON COUNTY HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM HOUSING AUTHORITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF MALHEUR AND HARNEY COUNTIES HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY JOSEPHINE HOUSING AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT COUNCIL HOUSING AUTHORITY LINN BENTON HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM MARION COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY MARION COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY MID-COLUMBIA AND COLUMBIA GORGE HOUSING AUTHORITIES HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER SECTION 8 NORTH BEND CITY COOS-CURRY HOUSING AUTHORITIES HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHEAST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHEAST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY SALEM HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING PROGRAMS UMATILLA COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING AUTHORITY UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT WEST VALLEY HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM
